findings.description: Bold emphasis on 'TECHNICAL REVIEW COMMITTEE' in the document header is lost in the HTML conversion.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, 'TECHNICAL REVIEW COMMITTEE' is rendered in bold, visually distinguishing it from the non-bold 'NEUSE RIVER BASIN HYDROLOGIC MODEL' and 'MEETING' lines. In the HTML, all three header lines appear in the same regular weight, removing the bold emphasis entirely.
